summary: A student from Block 3 presented with a severe rash and mild fever, possibly an allergic reaction. Precautions are being taken.
official_verdict: No official outbreak, just a single allergy case. Students should not panic about measles or chicken pox rumors.

summary: 3 cases of viral symptoms reported. Routine isolation protocols in place.
official_verdict: Students are advised to wear masks in common areas and report any fever early. No cause for panic.
Water quality test results came back 'Safe'. The rumors about contaminated supply are false.
